title: Start Map
primary_interaction: Switch sectioning modes choose a route or open a placeholder wiki page
validation: Learner opens a material placeholder or activity from lab station CompTIA or course sequence view

title: Connector Drag Match
validation: Learner places all four cards correctly

title: Connector Flash Cards
validation: Learner flips all cards and marks known items

title: Symptom Match
primary_interaction: Match symptom clues to safest first checks
validation: Learner places all five symptom clues correctly

title: Laptop Hardware
primary_interaction: Use Learn Practice or Quiz mode then hover numbered hotspots and type matching part names
validation: Learner checks all five numbered laptop answers correctly without covering the diagram

title: Ticket Board
validation: Learner moves all five tickets to done

title: Topology Trace
validation: Learner traces laptop to router to DNS to website

title: Evidence Export
primary_interaction: Refresh copy or download a lab evidence summary
validation: Learner creates a shareable evidence note after activity work
